items.title: Quick-add frequent items
items.description: Add common items from smart chips in list details. Suggestions avoid items already on your active list and can be dismissed when you do not need them.

items.title: Start from templates
items.description: Create new shopping lists faster with built-in templates that prefill the list name, color, description, and starter items.

items.title: Alexa setup support
items.description: Baskit can now complete Alexa account linking and lets signed-in users choose the default cloud list for voice assistant items.

items.title: Cleaner list details
items.description: List details now show more items at once with a compact header, circular progress, clearer active-item counts, and collapsible completed items.

items.title: Reliability improvements
items.description: Improved cloud list permissions, member timestamp handling, Alexa linking handoff, and item update behavior.
